text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One morning on a day off...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Just like that! Take that! And that!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
VICTORY! This week's episode of Princess Fighter
was awesome!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It happens every time I watch, but I just can't contain the desire to jump up and get moving! I want to do battle against ne'er-do-wells right now!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I know what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
After watching an exciting movie or reading a
great book, I often find myself wanting to
recreate great scenes from them!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! I don't care if it makes me a copycat! I'll
do what I want to do!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And who knows? This new experience could
become a spark that leads to me discovering a
new side of myself!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, I must go bust something up to release all
this energy! RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, Princess Fighter's Princess
Sky Step technique was really incredible...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
One quick burst forward, and she was gliding
gracefully. It was almost as if she was running on
air...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps as a result of her newfound inspiration,
Nishino Flower's movements become sharper than
ever.
